title: 3D Convolution & Upsampling
description: System applies factorized and multi-stage 3D transposed convolutions for spatial upsampling in the decoder of LatentRecon
use_cases: Upsample with channel reduction then transposed conv [ConvTranspose3dReduced]
Upsample via sequential temporal + spatial deconv stages [MultiStageConvTranspose3d]
Decode patchified token sequence into spatiotemporal feature volume [LatentRecon.forward_gaussians]
Select upsampling module at runtime via config key [transposed_conv_type]

key_classes.name: ConvTranspose3dFactorized
key_classes.init_params: in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride, padding, upsample_mode='trilinear', use_channel_reduction=True, gradient_checkpoint=True
key_classes.notes: Does NOT use ConvTranspose3d; uses interpolation + regular Conv3d. Duplicated definition in file (lines 191 & 235 — second overwrites first).

key_classes.name: ConvTranspose3dReduced
key_classes.init_params: in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride, padding, hidden_channels=None, use_channel_reduction=True
components: conv: nn.ConvTranspose3d(conv_in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride, padding)
key_classes.notes: Uses true transposed convolution after optional channel bottleneck. gradient_checkpoint passed at call time, not __init__.

key_classes.name: MultiStageConvTranspose3d
key_classes.init_params: in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size, stride, padding, multi_stage=True, norm_layer=None, activation=nn.ReLU, gradient_checkpoint=False
components: temporal_blocks: nn.ModuleList of Sequential[ConvTranspose3d(kD=3,kH=1,kW=1, sD=2,sH=1,sW=1) + norm? + act?]
spatial_blocks: nn.ModuleList of Sequential[ConvTranspose3d(kD=1,kH=3,kW=3, sD=1,sH=2,sW=2) + norm? + act?]
forward_steps: 2. pre_pad(x): ConstantPad3d to align spatial dimensions
3. For each block in temporal_blocks: ConvTranspose3d(stride=(2,1,1)) × log2(sD) times
4. For each block in spatial_blocks: ConvTranspose3d(stride=(1,2,2)) × log2(sH) times
key_classes.notes: Decomposes stride=(sD,sH,sW) into log2(sD) temporal stages + log2(sH) spatial stages. Each stage doubles one dimension. Optional norm/activation per stage.

relationships: All three custom classes compose nn.Conv3d / nn.ConvTranspose3d internally
All three custom classes depend_on forward_checkpointing utility
ConvTranspose3dFactorized uses F.interpolate (not ConvTranspose3d) for upsampling
interaction_flow: LatentRecon.__init__ → selects transposed_conv_module based on opt.transposed_conv_type
LatentRecon.__init__ → instantiates self.deconv = transposed_conv_module(blocks_out_channels, output_dims, patch_size_out, stride, padding)
LatentRecon.forward_gaussians → rearrange tokens: 'b (t h w) c -> b c t h w'
LatentRecon.forward_gaussians → forward_checkpointing(self.deconv, x) → upsampled feature volume
MultiStageConvTranspose3d.forward: ConstantPad3d → temporal_blocks loop → spatial_blocks loop
important_notes: ConvTranspose3dFactorized is defined TWICE in model.py (lines 191 and 235); second definition is active.
ConvTranspose3dFactorized uses interpolation (not transposed conv) despite its name.
MultiStageConvTranspose3d lazily computes pre_pad on first forward pass.
All modules are imported in model_latent_recon.py from src.models.utils.model.
gradient_checkpoint flag controls memory vs. compute tradeoff at each sub-step.
LatentRecon also supports a cosmos decoder path (load_cosmos_1_decoder) as alternative to these modules.
